quizzes.question: What is the primary requirement for a novel to be eligible for the Booker Prize?
options: It must be written by a Commonwealth author
It must be an original novel written in English and published in the UK
It must be a debut novel
It must focus on socio-political themes
quizzes.answer: It must be an original novel written in English and published in the UK

quizzes.question: Which work was named 'Booker of the Bookers' for both the 25th and 40th anniversaries?
In which years did J.M. Coetzee win the Booker Prize?
Who was the first Indian-origin author listed to win the Booker Prize?
Which two authors mentioned in the text won the Booker Prize for their debut novels?
The Booker Prize was formerly known by what name?
options: The Booker of the Bookers Prize

quizzes.question: J.M. Coetzee is noted in the text for having won which other prestigious award?
In what year did Aravind Adiga win the Booker Prize?
What common theme is specifically mentioned in the text regarding J.M. Coetzee’s works?
Which author won the Booker Prize for 'The Inheritance of Loss'?
